title: bassovia solanacea var. glabrescens
intro: Bassovia solanacea var. glabrescens, also known as glabrous basswood or glabrous angostura, is a plant species used in traditional medicine. The medicinal properties of Bassovia solanacea var. glabrescens include its ability to act as a vasodilator, helping to lower blood pressure, and its antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Bassovia solanacea var. glabrescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
